> **官方文档：** [https://rclone.org/commands/rclone_move/](https://rclone.org/commands/rclone_move/)
# rclone move

将文件从 source 移动到 dest。

## 概要

将源目录的内容移动到目标目录。如果源和目标存在重叠，且后端不支持服务端目录移动操作，rclone 将报错。

要移动单个文件，请改用 [moveto](/commands/rclone_moveto/) 命令。

如果未使用过滤器且条件允许，rclone 会在服务端把 `source:path` 移动到 `dest:path`。操作完成后 `source:path` 将不复存在。

否则，对 `source:path` 中经过过滤器筛选（若有）的每个文件，会将其移动到 `dest:path`。如果可能，使用服务端移动；否则先把文件（尽可能在服务端）复制到 `dest:path`，再（若复制无错误）删除 `source:path` 中的原文件。

如果想在移动后删除空的源目录，请使用 `--delete-empty-src-dirs` 标志。

有关控制 rclone 是否列举目标目录的说明，请参阅 [--no-traverse](/docs/#no-traverse) 选项。向大型目标目录移动少量文件时，启用此选项可显著提升传输速度。

如果后端支持，rclone 会同步文件和目录的修改时间。如果需要同步元数据，请使用 `--metadata` 标志。

注意，根目录的修改时间和元数据**不会**被同步。更多信息请参阅 <https://github.com/rclone/rclone/issues/7652>。

**重要提示**：此操作可能导致数据丢失，请先用 `--dry-run` 或 `--interactive`/`-i` 标志进行测试。

**提示**：使用 `-P`/`--progress` 标志可查看实时传输统计信息。

## 日志标志

`--differ`、`--missing-on-dst`、`--missing-on-src`、`--match` 和 `--error` 标志会按行将路径写入指定的文件名（若为 `-` 则写入 stdout）。下方帮助中说明了它们写入的内容。例如 `--differ` 会写入所有同时存在于源和目标但内容不同的路径。

`--combined` 标志会写入一个文件（或 stdout），其中包含所有文件路径，前面是一个符号和一个空格，再跟上路径，用以说明该路径发生了什么。这让人联想到 diff 文件。

- `= path` 表示该路径在源和目标中都存在且完全相同
- `- path` 表示该路径在源中缺失，因此只存在于目标
- `+ path` 表示该路径在目标中缺失，因此只存在于源
- `* path` 表示该路径在源和目标中都存在但内容不同。
- `! path` 表示读取或哈希源或目标时发生错误。

`--dest-after` 标志使用与 [`lsf`](/commands/rclone_lsf/#synopsis) 相同的格式标志（包括 [可自定义的哈希、修改时间等选项](/commands/rclone_lsf/#synopsis)）写入列表文件。概念上类似于 rsync 的 `--itemize-changes`，但并不完全相同——它应当输出命令完成后目标上文件的准确列表。

当设置了 `--no-traverse` 标志时，所有涉及仅存在于目标上的文件的日志都将不完整或完全缺失。

请注意，这些日志标志存在一些限制，某些场景目前尚不支持：

- `--max-duration` / `CutoffModeHard`
- `--compare-dest` / `--copy-dest`
- 一次性对整个目录的服务端移动
- 高级别重试，因为会出现重复（使用 `--retries 1` 禁用）
- 某些异常的错误场景

另请注意，每个文件在执行过程中就会被记录，而非执行结束后，因此它最适合用作对每个文件应该发生什么的预测器（结果可能与实际情况相符，也可能不符）。

```
rclone move source:path dest:path [flags]
```

## 选项

```
      --absolute                Put a leading / in front of path names
      --combined string         Make a combined report of changes to this file
      --create-empty-src-dirs   Create empty source dirs on destination after move
      --csv                     Output in CSV format
      --delete-empty-src-dirs   Delete empty source dirs after move
      --dest-after string       Report all files that exist on the dest post-sync
      --differ string           Report all non-matching files to this file
  -d, --dir-slash               Append a slash to directory names (default true)
      --dirs-only               Only list directories
      --error string            Report all files with errors (hashing or reading) to this file
      --files-only              Only list files (default true)
  -F, --format string           Output format - see lsf help for details (default "p")
      --hash h                  Use this hash when h is used in the format MD5|SHA-1|DropboxHash (default "md5")
  -h, --help                    help for move
      --match string            Report all matching files to this file
      --missing-on-dst string   Report all files missing from the destination to this file
      --missing-on-src string   Report all files missing from the source to this file
  -s, --separator string        Separator for the items in the format (default ";")
  -t, --timeformat string       Specify a custom time format - see docs for details (default: 2006-01-02 15:04:05)
```

与其他命令共用的选项将在下文中说明。
此处未列出的全局选项请参阅 [全局标志页面](/flags/)。

### 复制选项

任何可以复制文件的标志

```text
      --check-first                                 Do all the checks before starting transfers
  -c, --checksum                                    Check for changes with size & checksum (if available, or fallback to size only)
      --compare-dest stringArray                    Include additional server-side paths during comparison
      --copy-dest stringArray                       Implies --compare-dest but also copies files from paths into destination
      --cutoff-mode HARD|SOFT|CAUTIOUS              Mode to stop transfers when reaching the max transfer limit HARD|SOFT|CAUTIOUS (default HARD)
      --ignore-case-sync                            Ignore case when synchronizing
      --ignore-checksum                             Skip post copy check of checksums
      --ignore-existing                             Skip all files that exist on destination
      --ignore-size                                 Ignore size when skipping use modtime or checksum
  -I, --ignore-times                                Don't skip items that match size and time - transfer all unconditionally
      --immutable                                   Do not modify files, fail if existing files have been modified
      --inplace                                     Download directly to destination file instead of atomic download to temp/rename
  -l, --links                                       Translate symlinks to/from regular files with a '.rclonelink' extension
      --max-backlog int                             Maximum number of objects in sync or check backlog (default 10000)
      --max-duration Duration                       Maximum duration rclone will transfer data for (default 0s)
      --max-transfer SizeSuffix                     Maximum size of data to transfer (default off)
  -M, --metadata                                    If set, preserve metadata when copying objects
      --modify-window Duration                      Max time diff to be considered the same (default 1ns)
      --multi-thread-chunk-size SizeSuffix          Chunk size for multi-thread downloads / uploads, if not set by filesystem (default 64Mi)
      --multi-thread-cutoff SizeSuffix              Use multi-thread downloads for files above this size (default 256Mi)
      --multi-thread-streams int                    Number of streams to use for multi-thread downloads (default 4)
      --multi-thread-write-buffer-size SizeSuffix   In memory buffer size for writing when in multi-thread mode (default 128Ki)
      --name-transform stringArray                  Transform paths during the copy process
      --no-check-dest                               Don't check the destination, copy regardless
      --no-traverse                                 Don't traverse destination file system on copy
      --no-update-dir-modtime                       Don't update directory modification times
      --no-update-modtime                           Don't update destination modtime if files identical
      --order-by string                             Instructions on how to order the transfers, e.g. 'size,descending'
      --partial-suffix string                       Add partial-suffix to temporary file name when --inplace is not used (default ".partial")
      --refresh-times                               Refresh the modtime of remote files
      --server-side-across-configs                  Allow server-side operations (e.g. copy) to work across different configs
      --size-only                                   Skip based on size only, not modtime or checksum
      --streaming-upload-cutoff SizeSuffix          Cutoff for switching to chunked upload if file size is unknown, upload starts after reaching cutoff or when file ends (default 100Ki)
  -u, --update                                      Skip files that are newer on the destination
```

### 重要选项

对大多数命令有用的重要标志

```text
  -n, --dry-run         Do a trial run with no permanent changes
  -i, --interactive     Enable interactive mode
  -v, --verbose count   Print lots more stuff (repeat for more)
```

### 过滤选项

用于过滤目录列表的标志

```text
      --delete-excluded                     Delete files on dest excluded from sync
      --exclude stringArray                 Exclude files matching pattern
      --exclude-from stringArray            Read file exclude patterns from file (use - to read from stdin)
      --exclude-if-present stringArray      Exclude directories if filename is present
      --files-from stringArray              Read list of source-file names from file (use - to read from stdin)
      --files-from-raw stringArray          Read list of source-file names from file without any processing of lines (use - to read from stdin)
  -f, --filter stringArray                  Add a file filtering rule
      --filter-from stringArray             Read file filtering patterns from a file (use - to read from stdin)
      --hash-filter string                  Partition filenames by hash k/n or randomly @/n
      --ignore-case                         Ignore case in filters (case insensitive)
      --include stringArray                 Include files matching pattern
      --include-from stringArray            Read file include patterns from file (use - to read from stdin)
      --max-age Duration                    Only transfer files younger than this in s or suffix ms|s|m|h|d|w|M|y (default off)
      --max-depth int                       If set limits the recursion depth to this (default -1)
      --max-size SizeSuffix                 Only transfer files smaller than this in KiB or suffix B|K|M|G|T|P (default off)
      --metadata-exclude stringArray        Exclude metadatas matching pattern
      --metadata-exclude-from stringArray   Read metadata exclude patterns from file (use - to read from stdin)
      --metadata-filter stringArray         Add a metadata filtering rule
      --metadata-filter-from stringArray    Read metadata filtering patterns from a file (use - to read from stdin)
      --metadata-include stringArray        Include metadatas matching pattern
      --metadata-include-from stringArray   Read metadata include patterns from file (use - to read from stdin)
      --min-age Duration                    Only transfer files older than this in s or suffix ms|s|m|h|d|w|M|y (default off)
      --min-size SizeSuffix                 Only transfer files bigger than this in KiB or suffix B|K|M|G|T|P (default off)
```

### 列表选项

用于列举目录的标志

```text
      --default-time Time   Time to show if modtime is unknown for files and directories (default 2000-01-01T00:00:00Z)
      --fast-list           Use recursive list if available; uses more memory but fewer transactions
```
